sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91770" key="pu/rnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πύρν-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψωμός</foreign>, Id.: pl., expld. by <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζειαὶ κνηστώδεις, ὁ κατειργασμένος σῖτος, χόρτος</foreign> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μαγίς</foreign>, Id.</entryFree>
